mapper.select: SELECT r.rno,r.bno,m.mno,m.nickname,r.replytext,r.regdate AS regDate FROM REPLY r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.writer = m.mno WHERE r.bno = #{bno}
SELECT r.rno,r.bno,m.mno,m.nickname,r.replytext,r.regdate AS regDate FROM REPLY r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.writer = m.mno WHERE r.writer = #{mno} LIMIT #{cri.skip},#{cri.amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE bno = #{bno};
